sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-signed-quantized conversion using Q15 scale and signed zero-point, preserving two's-complement INT8 behavior.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational signed integer GEMM over centered quantized operands with INT32 accumulation.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational dequantization from INT32 accumulators to packed IEEE-754 FP32 outputs using combined Q15 scales.
